theorem: APF charged-lepton QED scalar normalization and count-source witness
claim: v43 adds an APF-count scalar normalization eta0=1/5063 to the v42 generation-shape witness, reducing the diagnostic pole residuals below 1e-3 percent without using pole masses as inputs.

diagnostic_only_external_comparison.note: external pole masses are used after eta0, eta1, eta2 are fixed; they do not define the coefficients

still_open.forced_denominator_proof_strength: D0 is banked as a count-source witness; publication proof should further justify why no adjacent scalar count envelope is admissible
still_open.QED_running_codomain: MSbar(mu) requires QED constants, thresholds, loop order, convention
still_open.residual_band: sub-1e-3 percent residual assigned to covariance/running channel

gate_status.G1_CODOMAIN_DECLARED: inherited pole-LO codomain; running codomain open
gate_status.G2_TRANSPORT_MAP: v43 scalar-normalized witness transport map supplied at C_count_witness status
gate_status.G3_CONSTANTS_LEDGER: APF count ledger declared; QED constants not yet invoked
gate_status.G4_COVARIANCE: formal residual/covariance channels named; numeric covariance still open
gate_status.G5_NO_SMUGGLING: pass for witness; inverse scalar diagnostic quarantined
gate_status.G6_RESIDUAL_CHANNELS: pass: residual band, covariance, and running-codomain channels named

promotion.before: charged leptons: P_export_candidate^pole_LO + C_residual_shape^APF_count_witness / common scalar eta0 open
promotion.after: charged leptons: P_export_candidate^pole_LO + C_scalar_normalized^APF_count_witness / covariance and running codomain open
